REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL 11/9/21 SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-27-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EVIDENCE TECHNOLOGIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JASON LISICA, SOLE PROPRIORTOR. SUBPOENAED WITNESS PAUL ENDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HEATH & YUEN APC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN YUEN, VP. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2220 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DEC-27-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
